---
title: ""
---

::: {.hero}
# Saori Kikuchi

### Accounting • Finance • Data Analytics

I am an accounting and finance professional with over 10 years of experience, currently expanding my skills in data analytics to support FP&A and business decision-making.

[View Projects](projects.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .btn-lg}
[Download CV](CV2026.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-lg}
:::

## What I Do

::: {.feature-grid}
::: {.feature-card}
### Finance
Financial reporting, budgeting, cost analysis, and cash flow management.
:::

::: {.feature-card}
### Analytics
Excel, Power Query, Power BI, and data-driven decision support.
:::

::: {.feature-card}
### Career Goal
Bridging accounting expertise with analytics to contribute to FP&A and business planning.
:::
:::
